title: Find My Device - Connected / Nearby device details
scenario: Find My Device screen shows device name, connection status, and Play button when GPS location permission is granted
steps: 1. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired and connected to the phone via the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Navigate to App Settings (gear icon or menu).
5. Ensure GPS location permission has been granted to the app.
6. Tap the blue geo icon (location/map icon).
7. Observe the new window that opens.
expected: A new window opens showing: the device name, connection status ("Connected"), a description instructing the user to ensure this device is the main audio source to play a tone, and a Play button.
